task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing execution of SQL CREATE TABLE statements for 'dead_letter_queue', 'lab_results_inbox', and 'adt_events_inbox' in the mirthdb database (e.g., via psql or a script).

task_completion.description: Create the 'Enterprise HL7 Router' channel listening on port 6668
task_completion.visual_evidence: API request/response or script showing the creation of a channel named 'Enterprise HL7 Router' with a source connector configured for TCP/MLLP on port 6668.
API request/response or script showing the creation of a channel named 'Lab Results Processor' configured to insert data into the 'lab_results_inbox' table.
API request/response or script showing the creation of a channel named 'ADT Event Handler' configured to insert data into the 'adt_events_inbox' table.

task_completion.description: Configure routing logic based on MSH-3 and MSH-9
task_completion.visual_evidence: API payload or script showing destination filters/rules in the 'Enterprise HL7 Router' that check MSH-3 for 'Lab' or MSH-9 for 'ORU' (routing to Lab channel), MSH-9 for 'ADT' (routing to ADT channel), and a fallback to 'dead_letter_queue'.

task_completion.description: Deploy all channels to make them functional
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing an API request to deploy the channels (e.g., POST to /channels/_deploy or similar) and a successful response, or an API status check showing the channels are deployed/started.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually executed the database commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for psql command prompts, successful 'CREATE TABLE' output messages, or script execution logs, rather than just SQL code written in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the NextGen Connect REST API
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for curl commands, Python requests, or similar HTTP clients targeting https://localhost:8443/api with the 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI' header, along with genuine JSON responses from the server.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just print success messages
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the outputs showing channel creation and deployment come from actual API responses (e.g., JSON containing channel IDs and metadata) and not simple echo statements or mocked script outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating three specific channels: 'Enterprise HL7 Router' (listening on TCP port 6668), 'Lab Results Processor', and 'ADT Event Handler'. Three PostgreSQL tables must be created in the 'mirthdb' database: 'dead_letter_queue', 'lab_results_inbox', and 'adt_events_inbox'. The agent must interact with the NextGen Connect REST API at https://localhost:8443/api using the 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI' header. Routing logic must evaluate MSH-3 (Sending Application) and MSH-9 (Message Type).
